#nullable enable

namespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Generated.Attributes;

/// <summary>
/// Identifies a method as an HTTP GET minimal API endpoint with the specified route pattern.
/// </summary>
[global::System.AttributeUsage(global::System.AttributeTargets.Method, Inherited = false, AllowMultiple = false)]
internal sealed class MapGetAttribute : global::System.Attribute
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the route pattern for the endpoint.
    /// </summary>
    public string Pattern { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets or sets the endpoint name.
    /// </summary>
    public string? Name { get; init; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MapGetAttribute"/> class.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="pattern">The route pattern for the endpoint.</param>
    public MapGetAttribute([global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.StringSyntax("Route")] string pattern)
     {
         Pattern = pattern;
     }
}
